item.title: PhotoQt
item.description: PhotoQt is a simple yet powerful and good looking image viewer, based on Qt/QML, published as open-source and completely free

item.title: Cozy Drive for Desktop
item.description: File Synchronisation for Cozy on Desktop and Laptop

item.title: RustDesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop, and alternative to TeamViewer

item.title: S3Drive
item.description: Zero Knowledge E2E encrypted storage compatible with multiple providers

item.title: Conky
item.description: Light-weight system monitor for X, Wayland, and other things, too

item.title: bitwarden
item.description: Open source password management solutions for individuals, teams, and business organizations.

item.title: CoolerControl
item.description: Monitor and control your cooling and other devices

item.title: AMDGPU_TOP
item.description: amdgpu_top is tool that display AMD GPU utilization.

item.title: CPU-X
item.description: Free software that gathers information on CPU, motherboard and more.

item.title: Etcher
item.description: Flash OS images to SD cards & USB drives, safely and easily.

item.title: Warp
item.description: Warp is a modern, Rust-based terminal with AI built in so you and your team can build great software, faster

item.title: buttercup
item.description: Buttercup is a free, open-source and cross-platform password manager

item.title: OneKeePass
item.description: OneKeePass is a cross-platform, open source and secure password manager

item.title: KeePassXC
item.description: KeePassXC is a modern, secure, and open-source password manager that stores and manages your most sensitive information

item.title: Passky
item.description: Passky is a simple, modern, lightweight, open source and secure password manager.

item.title: Passy
item.description: Offline password manager with cross-platform synchronization

item.title: nvtop
item.description: GPUs process monitoring for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA

item.title: OpenRGB
item.description: Open source RGB lighting control that doesn’t depend on manufacturer software

item.title: KDiskMark
item.description: A simple open-source disk benchmark tool for Linux distros
